arts.ttl: David de Gea ignites Ronaldo return rumours
arts.sum: David de Gea has ignited reports that Cristiano Ronaldo could make a shock return to Serie A with Fiorentina next month. Ronaldo spent just under 18 months playing with De Gea at Man Utd after returning to the club from Juventus in the summer of 2021.
